Then the leaks started — and Paxton made a ‘genius move’  CNNTrump is delaying Texas Senate endorsement to pressure GOP senators on SAVE America Act  PoliticoTrump Is Expected to Endorse Cornyn  The AtlanticTrump's endorsement in the Texas Senate race may hinge on passage of the SAVE America Act  NBC News
